prompt: A full-body anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Hoshimachi Suisei"} featuring long {argument name="hair color" default="light blue"} hair styled in voluminous twin tails secured with dark blue striped ribbons. She has soft purple eyes and a gentle smile. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="school uniform consisting of a white collared shirt, a blue tie, a beige cardigan worn slightly off the shoulders, and a grey plaid pleated mini skirt"}. Her outfit is completed with dark blue ankle socks and black loafers. She is {argument name="pose" default="standing with her hands clasped gently in front of her waist, legs slightly crossed in a relaxed posture"}. The background is a {argument name="background" default="simple light grey gradient"}, emphasizing the character's clean lines and soft, high-quality anime shading.
translatedPrompt: 一张 {argument name="character name" default="星街彗星"} 的动漫全身插画，她留着长长的 {argument name="hair color" default="浅蓝色"} 头发，扎成蓬松的双马尾，并用深蓝色条纹丝带固定。她有着柔和的紫色双眸和温柔的微笑。她身着 {argument name="outfit" default="校服，包括白色翻领衬衫、蓝色领带、一件微微滑落肩头的米色开衫，以及一条灰色格纹百褶短裙"}。她的装束搭配深蓝色短袜和黑色乐福鞋。她 {argument name="pose" default="双手轻扣于腰前，双腿微微交叉，姿态放松地站立"}。背景为 {argument name="background" default="简洁的浅灰色渐变"}，突显出角色干净的线条和柔和的高品质动漫阴影。

breakdown.creativeCore: 动漫女学生全身肖像：生成一张身着校服、背景简洁的动漫风格全身角色插画。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
